lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in like-new condition with no signs of wear. Mechanically, the engine, transmission, and all systems are functioning perfectly.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several visible scratches and some paint fading. The interior shows moderate wear and tear on the seats and carpet. Mechanical systems are currently operational, though the vehicle may require minor repairs or maintenance soon.

Experience automotive excellence with this stunning vehicle! It is in absolute mint condition, looking and performing as if it just left the showroom. Every detail has been meticulously cared for, making it a rare find for anyone seeking perfection on wheels. This is a truly pristine ride that you don't want to miss!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The exterior shows significant rust on the rocker panels and wheel wells, along with several large dents and faded clear coat. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with tears in the seats and a non-functional climate control system. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly, and there are noticeable fluid leaks from the undercarriage. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited as a project vehicle or for parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows the expected wear and tear for its age. While it remains a dependable driver, the exterior has some noticeable paint fading on the hood and roof, along with several small door dings and minor scratches. Inside, the upholstery is clean but shows some thinning and a small tear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, it runs well, though it may soon require routine maintenance like new brake pads. It's a solid, functional car for someone looking for reliable transportation without a showroom price tag.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive preservation. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, manifesting no discernible wear and reflecting a legacy of meticulous stewardship. Engineered for the discerning collector who demands uncompromising quality and mechanical integrity, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. Available now for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! I'm honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it's time for a new home! 🚗 This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—it seriously looks and smells brand new. I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garage-parked, and kept up with every single service. It drives like an absolute dream! If you're looking for perfection without the showroom price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions or if you want to come see it in person!
This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of the S54 platform, featuring the iconic 3.2L high-revving inline-
Showroom condition. No scratches or dents. Smoke-free interior. Full service history. Clean title in hand.

This exceptional vehicle is the definition of a time capsule. Finished in a deep, lustrous metallic paint that has been protected by a professional ceramic coating, there isn't a single swirl mark, stone chip, or blemish to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather seats are supple with absolutely no creasing, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic feature, knob, and driver-assist system functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained exclusively at the dealership with a comprehensive, documented service history available for review. The engine bay is spotless, and the undercarriage is as clean as the day it rolled off the assembly line. It comes complete with all original manuals, two sets

Presenting a vehicle of unrivaled preservation and mechanical integrity. This specimen remains in an impeccable, showroom-state condition, reflecting a history of meticulous maintenance and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning collector who demands absolute automotive excellence, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of the marque.

We are pleased to present this vehicle in exemplary, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, this automobile represents an uncompromising commitment to automotive excellence. Its flawless exterior and pristine interior reflect a level of care that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This is an investment-grade driving machine that performs with the same precision as the day it was manufactured.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that honestly feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, it is in incredible shape! I’ve babied this car since day one—always garaged and kept spotless. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. You really won’t find another one this clean. Come take a look, you're going to love it!

Offering a collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine condition. This example features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant, utilizing six individual throttle bodies and a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox for an unfiltered analog experience. The chassis is structurally sound with documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul already completed. Every factory VIN tag is present on the original panels, and the variable M differential lock operates flawlessly. The interior
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title.

This vehicle is a breathtaking example of automotive preservation, presenting in a state that can only be described as showroom-fresh. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like clarity, protected by a climate-controlled garage and free from the slightest swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns with factory precision, and the wheels are entirely devoid of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is an immaculate sanctuary; the premium leather remains supple and taut with no creasing, and the 'new car' scent lingers. All interior electronics, switches, and displays function with crisp, tactile feedback, exactly as they did on delivery day. Under the hood, the engine bay is detailed to a professional standard, reflecting a meticulous service history with no mechanical needs deferred. This car drives with the tightness and silence of a brand-new vehicle, offering a rare opportunity for a collector or discerning enthusiast to acquire a truly flawless specimen.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in showroom-grade condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved with an uncompromising attention to detail, it serves as a benchmark for its class. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a history of scrupulous care, ensuring an experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is an investment-grade opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than the absolute pinnacle of quality.

Presenting a superlative example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, having undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our most exacting standards. With its flawless exterior finish and a pristine cabin, this unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than absolute perfection in both aesthetics and mechanical integrity.

Hey friends! 🚗 I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolute mint condition—I’ve truly babied it since day one! It looks and smells like it just left the showroom floor. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the factory wait, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨

This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. Power is delivered via the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for razor-sharp throttle response and a screaming 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis remains factory-rigid with documented subframe reinforcement, paired with a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock. This example maintains impeccable mechanical integrity, showing no signs of fluid seepage, bushing fatigue, or cooling system degradation. Every component operates within original factory tolerances, offering a pure, unadulterated driving experience for the discerning collector seeking a concours-level specimen.
Used car. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records included.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in truly impeccable, showroom condition. Meticulously kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, rock chips, or blemishes to the factory paint. The interior is equally stunning, featuring premium leather upholstery that remains supple and free of any creases or wear, still retaining its original factory scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is flawless; it has been serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a comprehensive folder of records to prove its pampered history. Underneath, the chassis is as clean as the bodywork, reflecting a life of fair-weather driving only. For the buyer who demands perfection and a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered, this example is peerless.

Presented in museum-grade condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior upholstery, reflects a standard of care that exceeds expectations. Mechanically sound and aesthetically perfect, this specimen is suited for the most discerning collector. We invite you to experience a vehicle that defies its age and stands as a testament to uncompromising maintenance.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and maintained to the highest standards, it offers an uncompromising experience for the discerning driver. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, reflects a commitment to absolute quality and mechanical integrity. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished pedigree.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been meticulously cared for, never missed a service, and drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for total perfection on wheels, this is definitely the one. Come take a look and see for yourself, you won't be disappointed!

Presenting a museum-grade E92 M3, featuring the legendary S65 naturally aspirated V8 with its signature 8,400 RPM redline. This specimen boasts impeccable mechanical integrity, with documented preventative rod bearing replacement and a recent throttle actuator service. The chassis remains taut, benefitting from a factory-spec M Variable Differential Lock and EDC (Electronic Damping Control) that performs flawlessly. All body panels retain original VIN stickers and factory-correct paint depth. The interior features pristine Novillo leather with zero bolster wear, complemented by a crisp M-DCT gearbox that executes lightning-fast shifts. This is a collector-tier example for the discerning purist seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title.

Presenting an absolute showroom-standard specimen that redefines the term 'pristine.' This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, ensuring the exterior paint retains a deep, glass-like luster completely free of swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, reflecting a life of pampered, incident-free ownership. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather remains supple with no bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and the 'new car' scent lingers. All technological features and driver assists function with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, accompanied by a documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively by certified specialists. From the spotless engine bay to the unmarked alloy wheels, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Truly a turn-key investment for the most discerning enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits a pristine exterior and an impeccable interior, reflecting a level of care that borders on the extraordinary. With every mechanical component performing to factory specifications, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a specimen in showroom condition.
